title: Better Hitboxes
description: A highly customizable hitbox configuration mod.
body:
# Better Hitboxes
A highly customizable hitbox configuration mod for Fabric 1.21.x
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e2be5f3c0e3bdb31457fdc6e9e7f42024792ca6.png)

## ✨ Features
- Customize of hitboxes for:
  - Yourself
  - Players
  - Mobs
  - Projectiles
  - Items
  - Misc entities  
- Toggle visibility of:
  - Hitboxes  
  - Look vectors  
  - Eye markers  
- Custom colors for each section of the hitbox, with support for transparency.  
- Force hitboxes option, to prevent accidental disabling.
- Powered by YACL for a familiar and clean config screen.  

## 🛠️ Requirements
- Fabric
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/1eAoo2KR)
- [FabricAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM)

## 📌 Notes
The mod is client-side only.

Don't use this with another customizable hitbox mod, as it won't work as intended.
